patterns.name: Nitinol Memory Architecture
patterns.measurement_proxy: Count of NFL scars preventing DCCD violations per 1000 requests
patterns.boundary: Syntactic only — does not cover semantic logic errors

patterns.name: CFRSG (Conflict-Free Replicated Semantic Graph)
patterns.measurement_proxy: Version delta between agent graph state and client disk state
patterns.boundary: Requires monotonic version enforcement from client

patterns.name: Bidirectional Reversal-Immune Indexing
patterns.measurement_proxy: references/definition accuracy rate across both query directions
patterns.baseline: < 2% asymmetry between forward and reverse resolution accuracy
patterns.boundary: Requires Neo4j; in-memory hashmaps cannot support bidirectional traversal at scale

patterns.name: Scope Mereological Bounding
patterns.measurement_proxy: False reference rate in textDocument/references for shadowed variable names
patterns.boundary: Enforced via SCOPES_WITHIN edge chain; not applicable to eval()-based dynamic scoping

patterns.name: Betti-1 Loop Detection
patterns.measurement_proxy: Time to detect circular import cycle in module graph (ms)
patterns.baseline: < 200ms for graphs up to 100k nodes via DFS with visited-set
patterns.boundary: Applies to static imports only; dynamic require() calls require runtime tracing
